props.name: sortMode
props.description: Sort mode: "single" allows one column, "multi" allows up to 2 columns.

props.name: striped
props.description: When true, alternates row background colors for improved readability.

props.name: testId
props.description: Sets a data-testid attribute for automated testing.

props.name: variant
props.description: A relaxed variant of the table with more vertical padding for the cells.

props.name: width
props.description: Width of the table. By default it will fit the enclosed content.

events.name: onMultiSort
events.description: Callback fired when multi-column sorting changes.

events.name: onSort
events.description: Callback fired when a single-column sort header is clicked.

props.name: mb
props.description: Sets the bottom margin spacing token.

props.name: ml
props.description: Sets the left margin spacing token.

props.name: mr
props.description: Sets the right margin spacing token.

props.name: mt
props.description: Sets the top margin spacing token.

props.name: sortMode
props.description: Sets sort mode: "single" allows one column, "multi" allows up to 2 columns.

props.name: striped
props.description: When true, alternates row background colors for improved readability.

props.name: testId
props.description: Sets the data-testid attribute for automated testing.

props.name: variant
props.description: Sets a relaxed variant of the table with more vertical padding for the cells.

props.name: width
props.description: Width of the table. By default it will fit the enclosed content.

events.name: onMultiSort
events.description: Emits when multi-column sorting changes. Emits an array of sort entries as GoabTableOnMultiSortDetail.

events.name: onSort
events.description: Emits when a table column is sorted. Emits the sort column and direction as GoabTableOnSortDetail.

props.name: mb
props.description: Bottom margin.

props.name: ml
props.description: Left margin.

props.name: mr
props.description: Right margin.

props.name: mt
props.description: Top margin.

props.name: sort-mode
props.description: Sort mode: "single" allows one column, "multi" allows up to 2 columns.

props.name: striped
props.description: When true, alternates row background colors for improved readability.

props.name: testid
props.description: Sets a data-testid attribute for automated testing.

props.name: variant
props.description: A relaxed variant of the table with more vertical padding for the cells.

props.name: version
props.description: Design system version for styling.

props.name: width
props.description: Width of the table. By default it will fit the enclosed content.
